summary: Iteration 2 improvements: (1) Added bilingual text search (GET /api/locations/search?q=...) with paginated response and category filter; (2) Added GET /api/locations/featured endpoint for top-rated curated venues; (3) Added optional q text filter to existing GET /api/locations/ endpoint; (4) Added PaginatedLocationsResponse schema to server and matching TypeScript type to client; (5) Enriched seed data with 9 new curated venues: 3 family restaurants (野宴, 貝兒絲, 大樹先生), 2 pediatric medical facilities (台大兒童醫院, 馬偕兒童醫院), 2 nursing rooms at transit hubs (台北車站, 忠孝復興站), 2 additional attractions (板橋435, 基隆兒童館); (6) Created QuickSearch React component with debounce, bilingual autocomplete, error handling, and keyboard/mouse interaction; (7) Added 13 client tests for QuickSearch (all passing); (8) Added 9 server tests for new endpoints (all passing). Final: 186 server tests (1 skipped), 2525 client tests across 94 test files. Total: 2711 tests.
next_action: Project complete. Ready for production deployment.
